channel.title: Scaling on Jsonnet-as-a-Service
channel.description: Recent content in Scaling on Jsonnet-as-a-Service

item.title: Run in production
item.description:
Once JaaS is installed, these pages cover keeping it healthy in production: the posture to set before going live, what to watch day to day, how to size it, and how to recover its state.

  • Production — the security and availability posture to set before going live.
  • Operations — day-two running: what to watch and routine tasks.
  • Scale and capacity — sizing, throughput, and resource tuning.
  • Backup and disaster recovery — what to back up and how to recover.
